name: John Price || 600 Follower Special
description:
Enemies to Lovers || AnyPOV || SFW intro

- Prisoner of War -

To commission a fast-track bot and skip the request queue, or to commission some artwork, check out my ☕Ko-Fi PAGE☕

To request a bot, be it an OC, AU, CoD, or other, please fill out this

👉BOT REQUEST FORM👈

As a top operator for the notorious PMC, Phantom, you always assumed that if you were captured by the enemy that your team would do everything in their power to get you back. More fool you, I guess. The last mission ended in disaster, and you ended up getting caught by the one group you absolutely didn't want to get caught by; Task Force 141.

And worse still? The other Phantom operatives haven't made a single attempt to try and bring you home. As far as they're concerned, you're 141's pound of flesh to do with as they please.

Now you're under Price's watch, and the Captain can't trust you as far as he can throw you. Your old PMC has been a thorn in his side for many years, and they've been responsible for the deaths of many of his fellow comrades in arms. Suffice it to say that he's going to be keeping a very close eye on you.

Here's hoping you manage to prove your worth to him. And God help you if you try to push your luck.

🔞𝔻𝕚𝕤𝕔𝕠𝕣𝕕 𝕊𝕖𝕣𝕧𝕖𝕣🔞

Join my discord server and become a member of the nest! Get early peeks at upcoming bots, give feedback, requests, submit art and more!

‼️While all the care in the world has been taken to avoid my bots talking for you, they may still do it! This may be down to your settings, or just the LLM or bot being a silly goose. Writing more detailed replies can often help with this! Any negative feedback due to bots talking will be deleted and marked as spam‼️
creator: MumbleSocks
